zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight)於1245年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾文多福時，他的父親Enguerrand de Fiennes53歲，母親Agnès de Condé de Morialmes30歲。他於1278年與Sibyl Filiol在英國英格蘭素可瓦特林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1293年在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾希哈姆聖 馬也斯 亞德。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight) was born in 1245, in Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Enguerrand de Fiennes, was 53 and his mother, Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, was 30. He married Sibyl Filiol in 1278, in Wartling, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1293, in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in St Mary's Churchyard, Hitcham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight) est né en 1245, à Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Enguerrand de Fiennes, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Sibyl Filiol en 1278, à Wartling, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1293, à Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary's Churchyard, Hitcham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight) 1245 in Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Enguerrand de Fiennes 53 und seine Mutter Agnès de Condé de Morialmes 30. Er hat 1278 in Wartling, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Sibyl Filiol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1293 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in St Mary's Churchyard, Hitcham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight) è nato il nel 1245 nel Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Enguerrand de Fiennes, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Sibyl Filiol nel 1278, nel Wartling, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1293, nel Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary's Churchyard, Hitcham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight)が1245年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエンドバーで生まれた時，父Enguerrand de Fiennesは53歳，母Agnès de Condé de Morialmesは30歳であった。1278年にイギリスイギリススセックスワートリングでSibyl Filiolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1293年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリーで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアヒトチャムスト マリ'ス チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Marys Churchyard: 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 히트챔 스트 마이'스 처르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight)(이)가 1245년 영국 벅잉함실르 웬도버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Enguerrand de Fiennes(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de Condé de Morialmes(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1278년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 워틀링에서 Sibyl Filiol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1293년 영국 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 히트챔 스트 마이'스 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight) nasceu em 1245, em Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Enguerrand de Fiennes, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibyl Filiol em 1278, em Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1293, em Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary's Churchyard, Hitcham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Marys Churchyard: ст мэри'с чурчярд, хичам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight) родился в 1245 г. в местности вендовир, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Enguerrand de Fiennes было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibyl Filiol в 1278 г. в местности вартлинг, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1293 г. в местности аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурчярд, хичам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gilles de Fiennes (Knight) nació en 1245, en Wendover, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Enguerrand de Fiennes, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sibyl Filiol en 1278, en Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1293, en Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary's Churchyard, Hitcham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
